title: DRDO DEBEL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Defence Bioengineering & Electromedical Laboratory (DRDO DEBEL) Paid Internship Notification 2026 has been released on [Release Date] on the official website. A total of 8 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO DEBEL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026. who have pursued final-year B.E./B.Tech in disciplines such as Electronic & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, and more are eligible to apply for these Paid Internship vacancies. The offline application process for DRDO DEBEL Paid Internship Recruitment 2026 has started

qualification.education_qualification: Final year B.E./B.Tech in Electronic & Communication Engineering
qualification.details: Pursuing final year UG (7th semester from July 2026) in AICTE/UGC approved institutes. Disciplines: Electronic & Communication Engineering / Electronic Telecommunication / Electronic & Instrumentation / Embedded System Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering / Medical Electronics, Computer Science Engineering / Information Technology, Textile Engineering / Polymer Science, Chemistry, Physics.

selection_process: Merit basis (CGPA/percentage up to 5th semester) Interview/Interaction (possible)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO DEBEL Paid Internship?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the DRDO DEBEL Paid Internship is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the stipend offered for the Paid Internship?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a consolidated stipend of Rs. 30,000 per month for the duration of the internship.

faq.question: Q3. Which engineering disciplines are eligible for this internship?
faq.answer: Eligible disciplines include Electronic & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Textile Engineering, Chemistry, and Physics.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this internship?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for this internship.

faq.question: Q5. How will the selection be made for the internship?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on merit, calculated from your CGPA or percentage up to the 5th semester. An interview or interaction may also be conducted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the duration of the internship?
faq.answer: The start date for the internship training is 01st July 2026. The exact duration is not specified but it is a paid internship.

faq.question: Q7. Where is DRDO DEBEL located?
faq.answer: DRDO DEBEL is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka, with the pincode 560075.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and academic certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Who can apply for this internship?
faq.answer: Final year undergraduate students pursuing their 7th semester from AICTE/UGC approved institutes in the specified engineering and science disciplines are eligible to apply.
